author: bongho
description: Find and replace text using regular expressions with real-time preview and match highlighting. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: bongho
manifest.description: Find and replace text using regular expressions with real-time preview, match highlighting, and reusable multi-step pipeline rulesets.
manifest.name: Regex Replace

name: Regex Replace

releases.author: bongho
releases.description:
## Pipeline rulesets

- **Reusable pipeline rulesets**: save named rulesets (rules applied in sequence) and apply them with a step-by-step preview showing each rule's match count.
- **Import from regex-pipeline**: convert existing rulesets in `.obsidian/regex-rulesets/` into native rulesets.
- New command: **Apply ruleset (pipeline)**.

Rulesets are stored natively in plugin settings; single find/replace, live preview, and pattern history are unchanged.

### Internal
- Split `main.ts` into `src/` modules (pure refactor, no behavior change).

releases.author: bongho
releases.description:
## Fixes
- **Preview now scrolls to the change location for far-off matches** (#1). Previously the Before & After preview only rendered the first 1000 characters and dropped any match past that, so in large files the preview showed the unchanged top with no highlights. It now renders a window anchored on the first match and scrolls to it.

## Install (manual)
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/regex-replace/`.

releases.author: bongho
releases.description:
## Initial Release

### Features
- Regex find and replace with capture group support ($1, $2)
- Real-time match highlighting
- Preview before/after changes
- Regex flags toggle (g, i, m)
- Selection-only mode
- Pattern history
- Support for escape sequences (\n, \t, \r) in replacement
